goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'attraction type'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 20:15'.
The train should depart from 'peterborough' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'travel time', and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee and attraction type
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 20:15
The train should depart from peterborough and should leave on wednesday
Make sure you get price, travel time, and departure time
